final_verdict.summary: All 16 contract-018 verification commands were independently re-run from repo root, into fresh 018-qa-NN.txt evidence files (not reused from the generator's 018-verify-NN.txt), and all 16 pass (16/16 EXIT:0): guide exists and is valid HTML per html.parser; is fully self-contained (zero <link rel=stylesheet>, zero <script src>); makes zero external requests beyond github.com/niq-cnr; supports dark/light via prefers-color-scheme; has a genuinely sticky in-page nav TOC; embeds NIZAM.json's exact framework.version (0.1.0) in both <meta name=framework-version> and the footer; every repository-relative path the guide names resolves on disk; contains no 'nizamiq' branding string; renders all four DD-1..DD-4 cards; covers the execution loop naming 'circuit breaker', 'Mode A', and 'Mode B' literally; NIZAM.json indexes both ADRs and the guide; NIZAM.json still validates against registry/nizam-index.schema.json with the new docs module's key_documents resolving on disk; tools/validate.sh is green (8/8, exit 0); git-status scoping confirms only docs/guide/index.html and NIZAM.json changed outside .agent/; and NDS/AGF/GIP are each expanded to their canonical shipped title phrase with AGIP given an adjacent parenthetical expansion. A mandatory 8-probe adversarial spot-check (6 required categories plus 2 bonus hallucination-audit claims) found no hidden external resource, no version-anchor drift, no hallucinated or drifted factual claim across five independently re-checked claims (module reference cards, .nizam/ quickstart tree vs bootstrap.sh REQUIRED_MODULE_DIRS+provenance, circuit-breaker attempt table, the three abstract operations, and the agent-discovery order), no unsafe license assertion (repo has no LICENSE file; the guide's FAQ correctly defers to human-gated F-021 without asserting a specific license), genuine print and dark/light styling, balanced critical structural tags with a real sticky <nav>, and a clean git-status scope. QA verdict: PASS.
